import { types } from '@babel/core'; import { ParseResult } from '@babel/parser'; import { NodePath } from '@babel/traverse'; /** * @param candidates - If provided, only these identifiers will be candidates for dead code elimination. */ declare function export_default$1(ast: ParseResult<types.File>, candidates?: Set<NodePath<types.Identifier>>): void; declare function export_default(ast: ParseResult<types.File>): Set<NodePath<types.Identifier>>; export { export_default$1 as deadCodeElimination, export_default as findReferencedIdentifiers };
